categories.name: Materials that worsen urban heat islands
Traditional Indian flooring that cools houses
Passive cooling features in Indian architecture

fun_fact: Ever wondered how to beat the summer heat without an AC? Ancient architects had the answer — from building design to the materials used, traditional Indian architecture offers lessons on how to keep buildings cool. [Watch this video to learn how](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WBUt-AlyLrw).
